yoga.benefit: Balance and focus for stressful workdays in Dubai Media City.

endurance.detail: Mastering breathing through the nose during the first 2km of a run lowers the heart rate.

dental.detail: Using Xylitol after meals in the UAE (where dates/sweets are common) prevents acid attacks on enamel.

smoking_cessation.detail: When the urge hits, wait 5 minutes and perform a 'Box Breathing' cycle.
